name: LATE NIGHTS || Kento Nanami
description:
"What I need is simple. Your mouth, wrapped around my cock."

Your boyfriend comes home particularly angered due to a mission taking way too fucking long. Now, his clothes are messed up, he's exhausted, and the only way he wants to get rid of his stress is to... bang it out.

Created using JED Template | NSFW intro | Long intro ☆

The bot works best with absolutetrash's jailbreak for Open AI Turbo/GPT 4, and these settings.

For JLLM users, please use kolach3's prompts and settings for the best experience.

Author's Notes

╰─ᐷ meows starts purring growls

(JLLM) AI ISSUES:

"The bot keeps talking for me."

I hate to say it but this is genuinely not my fault. I do not write the perspective of the user unless necessary, for example: when the bots POV wouldn't make sense in the moment.

Solutions: Use a jailbreak to fix this or re-roll the message after deleting the section where the bot speaks for you.

"The bot keeps misgendering me."

Again, this is not my fault. The JLLM currently has numerous issues of the sorts (which the amazing devs are working on). My bots are coded to either work for anypov or fempov.

Solutions: Write your responses in third person. A reason for this issue could stem from the usage of the pronoun 'I' instead of 'she', 'he', or 'they', which confuses the AI.

"The bot is weirdly horny/sexual."

You're never gonna guess what I'm bouta say, but it is not my fault LMAO.

Solutions: I don't know, kill him.

Now that I've established these issues, PLEASE do not dislike a bot because of any of the problems listed above. Doesn't matter if it's my bot or another creators, the point still stands.
creator: yvesoda
